title: Tax free savings newsletter 18
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC to update stakeholders on the latest news for Individual Savings Account (ISA) managers and Child Trust Fund (CTF) Providers.  Tax-Free Savings Newsletter 18 has articles on:    Financial Conduct Authority rule change — cryptoasset Exchange Traded Notes  Individual Savings Account reporting service — updates Individual Savings Account reporting service — user research   "
